description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
examples:
Command Example
#
!o365-auditlog-search start_date="01/01/21" end_date="01/02/21" result_size=1
Context Example
#
{
"O365AuditLog"
:

outputs.description: The ID of the actor. O365AuditLog.Actor.Type The type of the actor.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.Actor.ID

outputs.description: The GUID of the organization that the actor belongs to. O365AuditLog.ActorIpAddress The actor's IP address in IPV4 or IPV6 address format.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.ActorContextId

outputs.description: The GUID that represents the application that is requesting the login. The display name can be looked up using the Entra ID Graph API. O365AuditLog.AzureActiveDirectoryEventType The type of Entra ID event.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.ApplicationId

outputs.description: The IP address of the device that was used when the activity was logged. The IP address is displayed in IPv4 or IPv6 address format. O365AuditLog.CreationTime Date
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.ClientIP

outputs.description: O365AuditLog.ExtendedProperties.Name Name of the extended properties. O365AuditLog.ExtendedProperties.Value
outputs.name: The date and time in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) when the user performed the activity.

outputs.description: Value of the extended properties. O365AuditLog.ModifiedProperties.Name Name of the modified properties.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The updated value of the property. O365AuditLog.ModifiedProperties.OldValue The previous value of the property.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.ModifiedProperties.NewValue

outputs.description: The unique ID of the log. O365AuditLog.InterSystemsId The GUID that tracked the actions across components within the Office 365 service.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.Id

outputs.description: The GUID that's generated by Entra ID to track the action. O365AuditLog.LogonError For failed logins, a user-readable description of the reason for the failure.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.IntraSystemId

outputs.description: For SharePoint and OneDrive for Business activity, the full path name of the file or folder accessed by the user. For Exchange admin audit logging, the name of the object that was modified by the cmdlet. O365AuditLog.Operation The operation used in the log.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.ObjectId

outputs.description: The GUID for your organization's Office 365 tenant. This value will always be the same for your organization, regardless of the Office 365 service in which it occurs. O365AuditLog.RecordType The type of operation indicated by the record. See the AuditLogRecordType table (
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.OrganizationId

outputs.description: details on the types of audit log records. O365AuditLog.ResultStatus Whether the action (specified in the Operation property) was successful. Possible values are Succeeded, PartiallySucceeded, or Failed. For Exchange admin activity, the value is either True or False.
outputs.name: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/office/office-365-management-api/office-365-management-activity-api-schema\#auditlogrecordtype\)for

outputs.description: The customer support ticket ID for the action in "act-on-behalf-of" situations. O365AuditLog.Target.ID The ID of the user on whom the action (identified by the Operation property) was performed.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.SupportTicketId

outputs.description: The type of the user on whom the action (identified by the Operation property) was performed. O365AuditLog.TargetContextId The GUID of the organization that the targeted user belongs to.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.Target.Type

outputs.description: Identifier (for example, email address) for the user who clicked on the URL. O365AuditLog.UserKey An alternative ID for the user identified in the UserId property. For example, this property is populated with the passport unique ID (PUID) for events performed by users in SharePoint, OneDrive for Business, and Exchange.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.UserId

outputs.description: The type of user who performed the operation. O365AuditLog.Version The version of the log.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.UserType

outputs.description: The Office 365 service where the activity occurred.
outputs.name: O365AuditLog.Workload
